query:
SELECT ch.userId, u.name, COUNT(*) as cycles, SUM(ch.totalPuzzles) as puzzles, SUM(ch.correctCount) as correct
FROM cycle_history ch
LEFT JOIN users u ON ch.userId = u.id
WHERE ch.userId IS NOT NULL AND ch.userId > 0
GROUP BY ch.userId, u.name
ORDER BY puzzles DESC
command:
